zh.Nether Middleton, Durham, England: 英國英格蘭達勒姆米德萊頓 在 哈特勒普爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix Clarvaux於大約1395年出生在英國越可爾卡芙特時，她的父親John Clervaux II26歲，母親Isabel de Richmond46歲。她於1411年與John Kelynghall在英國英格蘭達勒姆米德萊頓 聖 喬治結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世在法國皮卡迪索姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix Clarvaux于大约1395年出生在英国越可爾卡芙特时，她的父亲John Clervaux II26岁，母亲Isabel de Richmond46岁。她于1411年与John Kelynghall在英国英格兰達勒姆米德萊頓 聖 喬治结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世在法国皮卡迪索姆。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix Clarvaux was born about 1395, in Croft, Yorkshire, England, her father, John Clervaux II, was 26 and her mother, Isabel de Richmond, was 46. She married John Kelynghall in 1411, in Middleton St George, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in Somme, Picardie, France.

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Clarvaux(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 요르크실르 크로프트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Clervaux II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Richmond(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1411년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 미들레턴 스트 조지에서 John Kelynghall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Clarvaux nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Croft, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Clervaux II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Richmond, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com John Kelynghall em 1411, em Middleton St George, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix Clarvaux родилась около 1395 г. в местности крофт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Clervaux II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Richmond, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Kelynghall в 1411 г. в местности миддлетон ст джеордж, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция.
